The Starting Point
A Unique Niche.
Untapped Potential.

Crime Scene Cleaning had a genuinely fascinating niche — but no strategy to turn that curiosity into a loyal audience, and zero infrastructure to monetize that attention. The channel needed more than content. It needed a full audience growth system backed by social psychology, niche positioning, and a monetization layer.

"The niche was gold. The story was compelling. We just needed to engineer the system that turned viewers into buyers."

— Bakes Media
Our Approach
Social Psychology
+ Niche Domination.

We deployed a three-part framework: social psychology to trigger emotional investment, niche creation to own a specific corner of the internet, and a strategic video formula to convert viewers into customers. The result was 1.4 million subscribers, 150 million views, and ultimately a collaboration that generated $45,000 in a single day.

"We don't just make content. We build audiences engineered to buy."

— Bakes Media

The Biggest Win
The Codie Sanchez Collaboration

Once the audience was built and the trust was established, we positioned Crime Scene Cleaning for a collaboration with Codie Sanchez — one of the most influential business creators online. The result was $45,000 in course sales on day one — $245,000 total over 3 months.

$45,000
Course Revenue — Day 1

Subscribers at Time of Collab

"You can't land a Codie Sanchez collaboration without a channel that already looks like a media brand."

This is what 18+ months of audience building unlocks. The collaboration wasn't luck — it was the natural result of building a channel with credibility, consistency, and a loyal audience that trusts the creator.

Codie Sanchez's audience trusted her endorsement. Crime Scene Cleaning's audience was already primed to buy. The result: $245,000 in course sales before the day was over.

Platform Breakdown
6.3M Views a Month.
$100K in Sales.

TikTok wasn't an afterthought — it was a parallel revenue engine. We scaled Crime Scene Cleaning to 6.3 million TikTok views per month and an average of 8 million views monthly over the full run. 89.5% of reach came from Reels content alone. $100,000 in tracked sales attributed directly to TikTok-driven traffic.

The Proof
Real Dashboards. Real Numbers.

Every screenshot below is unedited — pulled directly from YouTube Studio, TikTok Analytics, and Instagram. This is what a fully built content infrastructure looks like in the data.

YouTube — 29M Views Period

29,034,303 views. 480.7K watch hours. +113.3K subscribers. $9,226 estimated revenue in a single tracked period.

TikTok — 376K to 6.8M Views

May: 376K views. June: 2.3M views (+164%). July 1–15: 6.8M views (+695%). Month-over-month explosive growth with $100K in tracked sales.

Instagram — 7.7M Views, 9M Accounts Reached

7,742,034 views in 30 days. 9,064,714 accounts reached over 90 days. 89.5% from Reels. 0% from ads — all organic.

The Framework
How We Built It

Three systems working in parallel — not one platform, not one strategy. This is how you build a creator brand that generates $45,000 in day one and $245,000 over 3 months.

1
Social Psychology Content

Every video was engineered to trigger curiosity, emotional investment, and community. We used group dynamics, shared values, and social proof to build an audience that doesn't just watch — it buys.

2
Niche Ownership

Crime Scene Cleaning owns its corner of the internet. We identified the exact content angle that no one else was doing at scale and doubled down — until the channel became the definitive destination for the niche.

3
Multi-Platform Distribution

YouTube for depth and SEO. TikTok for reach and impulse. Instagram Reels for discovery. Every platform fed the others — and every platform fed the revenue engine.

4
Monetization Infrastructure

Views without a product or funnel are just entertainment. We built the course, the offer, and the conversion layer — so when the Codie Sanchez collab hit, the infrastructure was ready to handle $45K on day one.

5
Strategic Collaborations

We positioned the channel for high-value collaborations by building credibility, audience size, and brand authority first. You don't land Codie Sanchez by asking — you earn it by becoming undeniable.

6
Compounding Results

150M views didn't happen overnight. Every video, every platform, every collaboration added to a compounding system that grew stronger over time — and keeps paying dividends long after the camera stops.
